shadowing.sentence: I'm hosting a small get-together this Saturday, feel free to drop by.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, under the name Nguyen, for two people.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Great, right this way. Here are your menus.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you. Could we start with some water, please?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Of course. Are you ready to order, or do you need more time?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I think we're ready. I'll have the grilled salmon, please.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Excellent choice. Anything to drink with that?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Just an iced tea, thank you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Perfect, I'll bring your food shortly.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Hi, what can I get started for you today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Hi, can I get a medium iced latte, please?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Sure. Would you like that with regular or oat milk?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Oat milk, please.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: No problem. Is that for here or to go?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: To go, please.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That'll be 45,000 dong. Can I get a name for the order?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: It's Anna.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Great, Anna. It'll be ready in a few minutes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Hi, let me know if you need any help.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thanks. I'm looking for a jacket in a medium size.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: We have a few options over here. What color are you thinking?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Maybe black or dark blue.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: This one is popular. Would you like to try it on?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, please. Where's the fitting room?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Right over there, on your left.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thanks, I'll go try it on now.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good morning, may I see your passport and ticket, please?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Sure, here you go.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Thank you. Do you have any bags to check in?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, just one suitcase.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Please put it on the scale... Okay, that's all set. Here's your boarding pass.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you. Which gate is it?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Gate 14. Boarding starts at 9:30.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Great, thank you for your help.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good afternoon, welcome to Lotus Hotel. Do you have a reservation?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, under the name Tran, for two nights.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Let me check... Yes, I found it. May I see your ID, please?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Here you are.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Thank you. Your room is on the fifth floor, room 502.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Is breakfast included?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Yes, breakfast is served from 6:30 to 10 in the restaurant downstairs.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Perfect, thank you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Excuse me, could you tell me how to get to the museum?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Sure. Go straight for two blocks, then turn left.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Turn left after two blocks, got it.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, then you'll see it on your right, next to the park.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Is it far from here?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Not really, about a ten-minute walk.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Thank you so much for your help.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: You're welcome, have a nice day!

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: To the airport, please. I have a flight at 3 pm.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: No problem, it should take about 30 minutes.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Could you turn on the meter, please?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Sure, no problem.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Is there a lot of traffic today?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: A little, but we still have plenty of time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Great, thank you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good morning, what seems to be the problem today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I've had a headache and a sore throat for two days.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I see. Do you have a fever as well?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: A little, I think.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Let me check your temperature... Yes, it's slightly high.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Is it serious?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: It looks like a common cold. I'll prescribe some medicine and you should rest.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you, doctor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good morning, how can I help you today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I'd like to open a savings account, please.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Sure. Do you have your ID and proof of address?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, here they are.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Thank you. Would you like a debit card with the account?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, please.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Great, please fill out this form, and we'll set everything up.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Okay, thank you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Hi, this is Minh from the design team.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Hi Minh, how can I help you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I wanted to ask if we could reschedule tomorrow's meeting.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Sure, is something wrong?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I have a conflict in the morning. Could we move it to the afternoon?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: That should work. How about 2 pm?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Perfect, 2 pm works for me. Thanks for understanding.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: No problem, see you then.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Thanks for coming in today. Could you start by telling me a bit about yourself?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Of course. I recently graduated with a degree in marketing and have interned at two companies.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That's great. What made you apply for this position?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I've always admired your company's creative campaigns, and I want to grow in this field.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: What would you say is your biggest strength?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I'm very organized and good at managing multiple projects at once.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: That's good to hear. Do you have any questions for me?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, what does a typical day look like in this role?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Let's get started. Is everyone here?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, I think we're all set.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Great. Let's go around and share quick updates.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Sure, I can start. My part of the project is on track.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good to hear. Any blockers I should know about?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Just one — we're waiting on approval from the design team.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Okay, I'll follow up on that today.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Sounds good, thanks.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Hey, long time no see! How have you been?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I've been good, just really busy with work. How about you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Same here, it's been a hectic month.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: What have you been working on?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Mostly a new project at the office. It's been challenging but interesting.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: That sounds exciting. We should catch up properly sometime.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Definitely, let's grab coffee this weekend.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Sounds great, I'll text you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Hi, I'm calling about an order that hasn't arrived yet.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Could I get your order number?

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Yes, it's 48213.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Let me check... I see the delay was caused by a shipping issue.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: This is the second time this has happened.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I completely understand your frustration. I'll refund the shipping fee right away.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Thank you, I appreciate that.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Of course, and I'm sorry again for the inconvenience.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: I heard it's your last day tomorrow!

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Yes, it's a bit bittersweet, but I'm excited for the new job.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: We're really going to miss you around here.

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: I'll miss you all too. It's been a great few years.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Let's keep in touch, okay?

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Of course, I'll message you once I've settled in.

lines.speaker: A
lines.text: Good luck with everything!

lines.speaker: B
lines.text: Thank you, take care!
